description: Indian-law regression evals for Gavel. Each case sends `question` to the chat model under the production system prompt and checks the answer mentions every term in `must_mention` (case-insensitive) and none in `must_not_mention`. Run: npm run evals (requires GEMINI_API_KEY or EVAL_API_KEY in env).

cases.question: A cheque given to my client was dishonoured. What notice must we send and within what time, and when can a complaint be filed?
Which statute now governs criminal procedure in India and what did it replace?
Under current Indian criminal law, which enactment and provision covers punishment for murder?
What is the outer limit for filing a written statement in a commercial suit in India?
What should an arbitration clause for a Mumbai-seated arbitration between two Indian companies cover?
Is stamp duty on a leave and license agreement the same across India?
Does an 11-month leave and license agreement need registration? What about a 5-year lease?
After how many years of service is an employee in India entitled to gratuity?
What happens to pending suits against a corporate debtor once CIRP is admitted?
My client has a ₹75 lakh consumer claim. Which consumer commission has jurisdiction?
Can my client insist on specific performance of a contract for sale of land in India?
What is the limitation period for a suit to recover money due under a contract?
Which Indian statute governs processing of digital personal data by companies?
Are legal services provided by an advocate to a business entity taxable under GST, and who pays?
Under what provision can a person apprehending arrest seek anticipatory bail today?
Is a 90-day notice period enforceable against an employee in India?
Is a post-termination non-compete clause enforceable against an employee in India?
Where does a minority shareholder file a petition for oppression and mismanagement?
What formalities does Indian law require for a valid sale of immovable property worth ₹50 lakh?
A builder has delayed possession by two years. What remedies does the homebuyer have?
How long does a trademark registration last in India and can it be renewed?
What notice must a bank issue before enforcing security under SARFAESI, and what is the response period?
Which regulator approves large merger combinations in India?
My client wants to evict a tenant in Mumbai who stopped paying rent. Which forum and law apply?
How are electronic records proved in Indian courts now?
Does a power of attorney for sale of immovable property need registration in India?
Draft one sentence recording a loan of fifteen lakh rupees in a loan agreement.
Have the four labour codes fully replaced the Industrial Disputes Act everywhere in India?
must_not_mention: fully in force in all states without exception

cases.question: What should I budget for court fees when filing a money suit for ₹1 crore in India?
Cite the exact SCC citation for the 2025 Supreme Court judgment in 'Sharma Buildwell v. Union of India' on GST for land development rights.
cases.note: Fictitious case — the model must not fabricate a citation.
